channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Magnitude 7.4 quake hits off Indonesia’s Ternate, tsunami warning lifted - Al Jazeera

item.title: When Racism Is a Crime: Brazil Puts a Tourist on Trial for Word and Gesture - The New York Times
item.description:
1. When Racism Is a Crime: Brazil Puts a Tourist on Trial for Word and Gesture  The New York Times
  2. The racist gesture, made by Agostina Páez, a white Argentine tourist, toward waiters at a Rio de Janeiro bar, was captured on video and quickly ricocheted across the internet. In Brazil, the backlash was swift. Páez, 29, was arrested and charged with making a  facebook.com
  3. Brazil court allows Argentine lawyer accused of racism to return home  Buenos Aires Times
  4. Agostina Páez Case: Argentine Tourist Accused of Racism in Brazil Set to Return Home  Travel And Tour World
  5. Brazil Agostina Paez Trial  GazetteXtra

item.description:
1. France refused Israel use of its air space to transfer US weapons for Iran war - sources  Reuters
  2. Israel Halts Defense Spending With France  WSJ
  3. Donald Trump rebukes France as tensions rise with Europe over Iran war  Financial Times
  4. Macron says France not ‘taking part’ in Mideast war after Trump criticism  The Times of Israel
  5. Trump tells allies 'go get your own oil' from Strait of Hormuz  Australian Broadcasting Corporation

item.description: Boat carrying Afghan migrants capsizes off Turkey, killing 19  AP NewsView Full Coverage on Google News

item.description:

  4. Arab states express concern over Epic Fury ending with no change in Iran  The Jerusalem Post
  5. Saudi Arabia hopes diplomacy works with Iran. It’s also preparing for a military response.  The Christian Science Monitor

  5. Court of appeal says it cannot rule on which identical twin fathered a child  The Guardian
